MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF KAUSHIK DATTANI'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES.

Appearances: Michael Heath of the Law Offices of Michael Heath (415.931.4207) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Fees are awarded in the amount of $20,430.29 plus costs in the amount of $1,480.80 for a total award of $21,911.09. Order and amended judgment signed. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
